jobs.title: AI Trainer
bullets: Evaluated multimodal AI agents against structured rubrics to assess response quality, reasoning accuracy, and domain understanding across generalist tasks.

Built AutoHandshake!, a Selenium-based RPA suite that eliminated 95% of manual annotation and triage effort across 400+ contractor hours with unattended execution, failure recovery, and full audit trails.
Mentored contractors on platform operations, rubric interpretation, and efficient evaluation workflows.

jobs.title: Search Quality Evaluator
bullets: Assessed search relevance and LLM output quality against detailed rubrics across Google query simulations and third-party models, identifying failure patterns that informed ranking and UX improvements.

jobs.title: Freelance Software Engineer
bullets: Developed workflow automation tools and SDKs for web API integration and device I/O, eliminating repetitive manual processes for individual clients.
Built an AI-assisted grading platform with LMS OAuth integration and automated rubric application, achieving ~95% accuracy in real-world classroom use and cutting instructor grading time by half.
